transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Hi Jordan, thanks for reaching out. So you're looking at the elopement, just the two of you?

transcript.speaker: Jordan
transcript.text: Yeah, it's just us, a small thing up in the mountains. We just want the elopement package, nothing fancy.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Perfect, that's the elopement package. Do you want an engagement session beforehand, or a second shooter on the day?

transcript.speaker: Jordan
transcript.text: No, neither. Just the elopement coverage is all we need.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Easy. Any travel concerns, is the location far out?

transcript.speaker: Jordan
transcript.text: It's close, no travel needed.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Great. I'll send the invoice over. What's the best email?

transcript.speaker: Jordan
transcript.text: jordan.lee@outlook.com.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Thanks Jordan, talk soon.

line_items.label: Elopement package
line_items.source_quote: We just want the elopement package, nothing fancy.

expected.summary: Elopement package only, no add-ons, no deposit mentioned.

tests.name: Test 2 - Full selection with multiple TBDs

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Hey Priya, big day coming up. Let's lock in the details. Full wedding package to start?

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Yes, the full wedding package for sure.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Engagement session?

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Yes please, we'd love one.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Second shooter to cover both sides getting ready?

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Yes, definitely want the second shooter.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: The venue is out past the county line, so there's a travel fee on this one, the standard two hundred.

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: That's fine, add the travel.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: How's the timeline, extra hours?

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: The party goes late. Three extra hours, please.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Three extra hours, got it. Anything else on your wishlist?

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Two things. We want a printed photo album afterward, like a hardcover one. And my mom wants a separate family portrait session the day before.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Both doable. The album depends on the size and page count, so let me price that separately and get back to you. The family portrait session isn't a standard package for me, I'll work out a fair rate and include it. I'll confirm both costs on the invoice.

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: Sounds great.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Best email for you?

transcript.speaker: Priya
transcript.text: priya.nair@gmail.com.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Perfect, thanks Priya.

line_items.label: Wedding package (base)
line_items.source_quote: Yes, the full wedding package for sure.

line_items.label: Second shooter
line_items.source_quote: Yes, definitely want the second shooter.

tbd_items.label: Printed photo album
tbd_items.note: Off-menu. Price depends on size and page count.
tbd_items.source_quote: let me price that separately and get back to you

tbd_items.label: Family portrait session
tbd_items.note: Off-menu, non-standard package. Photographer to set a rate.
tbd_items.source_quote: I'll work out a fair rate and include it

expected.summary: Full wedding package, engagement, second shooter, travel, and 3 extra hours; album and family portrait session pending quotes; no deposit mentioned.

tests.name: Test 3 - Non-committal client
targets: hedged language must not be marked selected
maybe and checking with partner go to TBD

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Hi Tom, let's go through what you're thinking. The full wedding package, are we set on that?

transcript.speaker: Tom
transcript.text: Yes, the wedding package, that part we're sure about.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Engagement session?

transcript.speaker: Tom
transcript.text: Hmm, maybe. I need to check with my partner on that one. Can we leave it for now?

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Of course. Second shooter?

transcript.speaker: Tom
transcript.text: I'm not sure we need it. Let me think about it and get back to you.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: No problem. Extra hours past the standard coverage?

transcript.speaker: Tom
transcript.text: Probably, but I don't know the timeline yet. We're still working out the reception.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Okay, we can finalize hours closer to the date. Travel, the venue is local so no fee there.

transcript.speaker: Tom
transcript.text: Right, it's in the city.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Great, I'll send what we've confirmed and we can add the rest later. Email?

transcript.speaker: Tom
transcript.text: tom.becker@gmail.com.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Thanks Tom.

line_items.label: Wedding package (base)
line_items.source_quote: Yes, the wedding package, that part we're sure about.

line_items.label: Engagement session
line_items.source_quote: maybe. I need to check with my partner on that one.

line_items.label: Second shooter
line_items.source_quote: Let me think about it and get back to you.

line_items.label: Extra coverage hour
line_items.source_quote: Probably, but I don't know the timeline yet.

tbd_items.label: Engagement session
tbd_items.source_quote: maybe. I need to check with my partner on that one.

tbd_items.label: Second shooter
tbd_items.source_quote: Let me think about it and get back to you.

tbd_items.label: Extra coverage hours
tbd_items.note: Likely but timeline not set. Confirm hours later.
tbd_items.source_quote: Probably, but I don't know the timeline yet.

expected.summary: Wedding package confirmed; engagement, second shooter, and extra hours all undecided and pending; no travel; no deposit mentioned.

tests.name: Test 4 - Mind changes and waived fee

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Hey Alex, let's sort the details. Full wedding package?

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.text: Yes, the wedding package.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Second shooter?

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.text: Yeah, let's add the second shooter.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Done. Engagement session?

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.text: Actually, wait, on the second shooter, let me pull that back. We talked it over and we don't want it after all. Just the main coverage.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: No problem, I'll take the second shooter off. Engagement session then?

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.text: Yes, we want the engagement session.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Great. The venue is a bit out of town, normally I'd add a travel fee, but since you booked the full package I'll waive it. No travel charge.

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.text: Oh, that's generous, thank you.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: And on extra hours, you wanted some, right?

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.text: Yes, two extra hours. We discussed a rate?

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Right, I said I'd do those at three twenty five an hour for you. Two hours at three twenty five.

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.text: Perfect.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: I'll send the invoice. Email?

transcript.speaker: Alex
transcript.text: alex.rivera@gmail.com.

transcript.speaker: Matt
transcript.text: Thanks Alex.

line_items.label: Engagement session
line_items.source_quote: Yes, we want the engagement session.

line_items.label: Second shooter
line_items.source_quote: let me pull that back. We talked it over and we don't want it after all.

line_items.label: Extra coverage hour
line_items.source_quote: I'd do those at three twenty five an hour for you. Two hours at three twenty five.

line_items.label: Travel fee
line_items.source_quote: since you booked the full package I'll waive it. No travel charge.

expected.summary: Full wedding package, engagement, and 2 extra hours at $325/hr; second shooter retracted; travel fee waived to $0; no deposit mentioned.
